official_source: Qatar Racing and Equestrian Club official race calendar

seasonality.sample_position: middle and later part of the 2025-26 season

revalidation.trigger: publication or opening meeting of the 2026-27 season
checks: official meeting-list and race-detail access remains available
race identity, ordered sequence, post time, race name and distance remain available
revalidation.rank_effect: A+ remains valid as demonstrated technical source capability unless a next-season source change is observed

rank_reason: The official ordered races arrays provided complete race identity, post time, race name and distance coverage for all tested races.
